Author: Wotou
Name: Pocket Station
Punchline: Turn your phone into a second screen for FFXIV — chat, player state, screenshots, live streaming & remote commands over LAN.
Description: Pocket Station runs a local web server inside FFXIV, letting you connect from any phone, tablet, or laptop on the same network. Monitor real-time game chat with custom filters, view player / party / target state (HP, MP, buffs, zone, currencies), capture screenshots or stream your game screen live to your mobile device, and execute whitelisted in-game commands remotely. Also integrates with DailyRoutines to toggle automation modules. Use Tailscale or router port forwarding to access it securely from outside your home network.
